title: Agentboard Role Frontmatter
description: JSON Schema for the YAML frontmatter block in a role definition file.

name.description: Human-readable role name, e.g. Backend Systems Architect.

description.description: One-sentence summary of the role's purpose and scope.

routes_to.description: Skill names this role delegates to. Each entry must be a valid skill identifier.

model_preference.description: Optional. Preferred model tier for this role: sonnet, opus, or haiku.

tags.description: Optional. Free-form labels for filtering and discoverability.

slug.description: Optional. Machine-safe kebab-case identifier, e.g. backend-architect.

label.description: Optional. Display label string used in agent identity headers.

ansi_color.description: Optional. 256-color ANSI code for terminal identity color, e.g. '75'.

mission.description: Optional. One-line mission statement shown at role activation.
